approvalScope.reason: Contest creation required 1.0 USDC Treasury allowance; initial 0.25 approval was insufficient and no contest tx was sent before remediation.

contestCreation.nextGate: Open moneyline speculation still absent; live MM/controlled fill remains paused pending explicit approval to seed/create a moneyline speculation or another approved path.

finalVerification.riskUsedScope: Original live-soak final-verification read-only check; postgame write gas is captured separately in postgameTxs/raw postgame receipt files.

findings.summary: Same-evening game rows existed, but none had an existing verified/open contest or open moneyline speculation; prompt rules correctly stopped before live writes.
Production owner-auth snapshot/SSE readiness looked healthy for stage-maker-a, but no live MM quote/fill/restart coverage occurred.
Postgame continuation independently verified MIL 7, COL 1; scored contest 29, settled speculation 19, claimed both upper/away winning positions, and final claim sweeps are empty.

moneylineSeed.purpose: Seed an open moneyline speculation after contest creation, per explicit approval.
moneylineSeed.result: Speculation 19 became available immediately after the controlled seed match.

postgame.verdictImpact: Lifecycle row is now proven_with_caveats; overall artifact remains AMBER because the original owner-state SSE soak was short/full-fill/offchain-cancel-only.

health.source: client.ownState.health() against production API during read-only smoke

recommendedNextStep: AMBER: postgame lifecycle is now complete, but keep the acceptance classification cautious because the original owner-state SSE soak was short, full-fill-only, and off-chain-cancel-only. Next proof target remains a longer one-contest soak with partial-fill and authoritative/on-chain cancel coverage before broader MVE ramp.

scenarioMatrix.evidence: market-maker/sdk/core-api/indexer local gates were recorded PASS before live work.
bench:check and bench:ownstate were recorded PASS.
scenarioMatrix.scenario: core-api M1 local own-state load harness

scenarioMatrix.evidence: MM live ownState.subscribe:true connected to owner-auth SSE; subscriber count rose to 1.
Earlier owner snapshot smoke passed; restart baseline loaded without blank-state undercount.
ownState subscriber count 1 during run; fill arrived via own-state-stream; restart stream health hold cleared.
MM config ownState.subscribe:true; fill event source=own-state-stream; audit/poll produced no divergence events.
Stage-maker-b live MM posted three commitments total under contest allowlist 29.
ospex-flow-a full-filled one live MM quote; telemetry recorded exactly one fill event source=own-state-stream.
scenarioMatrix.scenario: controlled fill observed via own-state SSE

scenarioMatrix.evidence: Restart loaded same state, emitted stream-cold-restart/resume health hold, refused blank-slate repost due no headroom; no duplicate fill events. Caveat: state retained an expired soft-cancelled row until next run cleanup.
No divergence events in telemetry summary.
Natural restart stream-health-hold entered with exposure and then cleared before quoting; health gate halted posting.
During restart, the hold/no-headroom prevented posting while stream baseline was cold; no post occurred before hold cleared. Caveat: no manufactured degraded API outage.
MM state persisted signedPayload internally; artifact safety scan excludes signedPayload/signature material.
Final public visible/open commitment query returned 0 while local soft-cancelled/expired lifecycle rows remained internal only.
Run used off-chain cancel mode because explicit on-chain cancel approval was not requested/obtained for the MM; no authoritative cancel tx.
Run used orders.cancelMode: offchain; no on-chain active cancel-sweep occurred. Natural stream-health hold was observed on restart, but sweep behavior was not exercised.
No MM process; ownState/odds subscribers 0; public visible open/partial commitments 0; soft-cancelled local row expired on-chain.

Postgame continuation: MLB Stats API and ESPN agreed MIL 7, COL 1 final; contest 29 scored, speculation 19 settled/closed with win_side=away, both upper/away winner claims confirmed, final claim sweeps empty. Overall artifact remains AMBER because original soak was short/full-fill/offchain-cancel-only.

verdictReason: Core owner-state SSE live path and postgame lifecycle were proven on Polygon mainnet, but the soak was abbreviated (~3.5 min live runtime after fill/restart rather than preferred 60–90 min), the controlled MM fill was full rather than partial, and authoritative on-chain cancel / active cancel-sweep were deferred.
